text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Hydration levels, heart rate, and blood pressure have all stabilized.
Maintenance complete.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your assistance. I will take my leave now.
choice_data_list: Hey, are you sure you're okay?
Hey, are you sure you're okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. My database shows that losing consciousness is expected
after high levels of exertion. I am currently taking appropriate
countermeasures.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
By current projections, I will have sufficient energy to resume activity
in 7 minutes and 28 seconds. I will continue regulating my breath until
then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I get the uneasy sense "resume activity" means she's planning to resume training.
choice_data_list:
Once you feel better, you're going back home...
right?

Once you feel better, you're going back home...
right?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Negative. There are 2,000 meters remaining that I must run.
choice_data_list: Absolutely not!
Absolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Why?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her the importance of gradually building endurance.
Taking on long-distance training too early can cause injuries.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Acknowledged. However, I have a goal I must achieve.
choice_data_list: What goal?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown—a series of medium- and long-distance G1
races consisting of the Satsuki Sho, Japanese Derby, and Kikuka Sho.
choice_data_list: (Hm... Hang on...)

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised you didn't know. That trainer's been gushing about how
he'll make Bourbon the perfect sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Mihono Bourbon's trainer is prepping her for short distances, why is
she here alone practicing for the Classic Triple Crown?
choice_data_list: Does your trainer know what you're doing?
Does your trainer know what you're doing?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
According to the Twinkle Series database, you have attained wins in
26 graded races. Your skill in handling medium- and long-distance
races is evident.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I would like your assistance in helping me train for the Classic Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I hate to break it to you but... you're just not cut out for long
distances. You already know that, right?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Correct. My base specifications are compatible with sprints. However,
I believe that I can increase my stamina.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text: There's a big chance you'd wind up getting hurt.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your concern is unnecessary. My father was a trainer, so I have run
exhaustive routines since youth. In other words, I am used to it.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Don't get distracted by unrealistic goals. If you stick to what you're
good at, you'll get a lot farther.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: In conclusion, he rejected my proposal.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I issued two other messages in an attempt to reach an agreement.
Unfortunately, I was met with silence.
choice_data_list: (...I get where he's coming from though.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I saw for myself how good a sprinter Mihono Bourbon is. It feels like a
waste of talent...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: However, my objective remains the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I compiled a training regimen to customize my specifications for
endurance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I intend to win a race of at least medium distance, and present
empirical data to my trainer in further negotiations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ambitious trainee's commitment to her cause is clear, but I can't
shake off the feeling that she'll run herself into danger.
choice_data_list:
Before we do anything rash, let's talk to your
train—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: 7 minutes and 30 seconds have elapsed. My body is now stable.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will resume training. Goodbye.
choice_data_list: W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without wasting a moment, the student speeds off again into the
night.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(1,200 meters completed. Estimated time of arrival at goal exceeds
target. Accelerating tempo.)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Even from afar, I can see Mihono Bourbon struggling to run.
choice_data_list: (I can't just stand here and do nothing!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know I shouldn't contradict her trainer's guidance, but... I rush over
to help Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Ahh... hah...
choice_data_list: ...Pay attention to your lap time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Lap time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I carefully explain the importance of pacing. Managing one's stamina
is crucial, especially during extended races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reminding Mihono Bourbon of her analytical prowess, I suggest that
she uses it to recalculate her time and distance while running.
choice_data_list: If you do that, I'm sure you'll improve.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. Updating my database accordingly. After I recover, I
will begin my measurements.
choice_data_list:
Sounds good. Why don't we start with 1,600
meters for now?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But—
choice_data_list: There's no need to rush.
There's no need to rush.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Affirmative. Adjusting speed parameters to match a "relaxed"
tempo. Commencing new training program.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(400 meters completed according to schedule. Increasing distance to
600 meters. Prioritizing lap time.)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: (Air intake regulation... confirmed.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with those changes, Mihono Bourbon safely completes 1,600
meters.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Adding personal best to my database.
choice_data_list: That was awesome! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without thinking, I start clapping my hands to celebrate Mihono
Bourbon's new record. She stares at me in response, her face
completely expressionless.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: ...What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Emotional status displays characteristics of "happiness."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your advice has been invaluable. I am certain this brings me one step
closer to the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her seemingly stoic look, I can't help but notice a tiny smile
forming around the corners of her lips.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that moment on, nightly trips to the racecourse become routine
as I keep a close eye on Mihono Bourbon to ensure her safety.
